name: Black Bean Chili with Ham and Corn
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Black beans; rinsed and drained
4 ounces Low-fat, honey roasted ham; diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet on medium high.
3. Add onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
4. Add garlic and red pepper. Sauté for another 3 minutes.
5. Add black beans, tomatoes, corn, chili powder, and cumin.
6. Mix tomato paste into chicken broth and mix into chili.
7. Simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
8. Add broccoli and ham and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Adjust seasonings as desired.
10. Warm bread in oven for 5 minutes. Slice and serve with chili.
11. Serve chili over rice and pass cheese and scallions to sprinkle over top.
